ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the episode */,
  "episode_number" TEXT /* Episode number (e.g., 0.1, 1, 2) */,
  "featured_eat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the featured restaurant */,
  "jordan_rating" REAL /* Rating given by Jordan (out of 100) */,
  "michael_rating" REAL /* Rating given by Michael (out of 100) */,
  "combined_rating" REAL /* Combined rating of Jordan and Michael (out of 100) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the episode */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video of the episode */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the episode */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "episode_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "episode_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the episode */,
  "episode_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the episode */,
  "episode_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares for the episode */,
  "episode_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments for the episode */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., planned, recorded, edited, published) */,
  "episode_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the episode */,
  "episode_tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the episode (e.g., fast food, fine dining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_featured_eat_id FOREIGN KEY ("featured_eat_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" INTEGER /* Type of cuisine offered */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_open_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant based on user reviews */,
  "restaurant_total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_features" TEXT /* Features of the restaurant (e.g., vegan options, outdoor seating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_cuisine_type FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_type") REFERENCES cuisine_types ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critics" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the critic */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the critic */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the critic's social media profiles */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the critic's profile picture */,
  "critic_email" TEXT /* Email address of the critic */,
  "critic_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the critic */,
  "critic_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the critic */,
  "critic_social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the critic's social media profiles */,
  "critic_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the critic */,
  "critic_total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews given by the critic */,
  "critic_specialties" TEXT /* Specialties of the critic (e.g., seafood, Italian cuisine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the engagement is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the episode */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "like" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user liked the episode */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  "share" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user shared the episode */,
  "engagement_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "engagement_location" TEXT /* Location of the user during engagement */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement (e.g., time spent watching the episode) */,
  "engagement_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "engagement_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_email_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user's email is verified */,
  "user_phone_number_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user's phone number is verified */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views by the user */,
  "user_total_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes by the user */,
  "user_total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments by the user */,
  "user_total_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares by the user */,
  "user_total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings given by the user */,
  "user_total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisine_types" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine type */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine type */,
  "cuisine_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the cuisine (e.g., Italy, United States) */,
  "cuisine_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the cuisine (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "cuisine_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the cuisine based on user reviews */,
  "cuisine_total_restaurants" INTEGER /* Total number of restaurants offering the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled episode */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being scheduled */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the episode is scheduled to air */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., planned, recorded, edited, published) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the episode schedule */,
  "schedule_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator who scheduled the episode */,
  "schedule_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., planned, recorded, edited, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_schedules_schedule_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_schedules_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content creator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the content creator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the content creator (e.g., producer, director, editor) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the content creator */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the content creator's social media profiles */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the content creator's profile picture */,
  "creator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the content creator */,
  "creator_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the content creator */,
  "creator_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the content creator */,
  "creator_social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the content creator's social media profiles */,
  "creator_total_episodes_produced" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes produced by the content creator */,
  "creator_average_episode_rating" REAL /* Average rating of episodes produced by the content creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_creators" (
  "episode_creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-creator relationship */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the content creator in the episode */,
  "episode_creator_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the content creator's role in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_creators_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_creators_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 100) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "rating_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for rating (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 100) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was given */,
  "review_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user giving the review */,
  "review_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "review_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for review (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
